creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Sergey,

- USE_PYTHON=-3.3 is all that's needed if it *doesn't* support 3.4

- OPTIONS_PLUMBUM needs a better description. See "Tip:" section in: 

http://www2.au.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/porters-handbook/book.html#makefile-options

Please update your patch to suit, and also include:

- portlint output (-AC flags)
- Build log from one of `port test`, testport (poudriere) or redports.org
